features.title: 7 Animal Archetypes
features.description: Choose from Owl (wisdom), Eagle (omniscience), Dolphin (creativity), Rabbit (multiplication), Ant (thoroughness), Elephant (memory), or Beaver (architecture). Each archetype brings a distinct cognitive style — and Buddy can blend archetypes based on your task.

features.title: Persistent Memory
features.description: Buddy never forgets. Every conversation, preference, and decision is stored in your personal 3D vector memory — so when you return, Buddy picks up exactly where you left off. No repetition. No starting over.

features.title: Cross-Device Presence
features.description: Start a conversation on your phone, continue on your laptop, finish on your tablet. HeadyBuddy maintains full context across every device you use — synchronized in real time through HeadyMe.

features.title: Context-Aware Responses
features.description: Buddy understands not just what you said, but what you meant — drawing on your full conversation history, personal preferences, and current task context to generate responses that feel like they came from someone who truly knows you.

features.title: Private & Encrypted
features.description: Your conversations are end-to-end encrypted. You decide what Buddy remembers, what it forgets, and what stays completely private. We don't sell your data. We don't train on your conversations without consent. Ever.

features.title: Creative Collaboration
features.description: Unlock Dolphin mode for writing, brainstorming, ideation, and artistic exploration. Buddy becomes a creative partner — generating ideas, drafting content, imagining alternatives, and helping you find the unexpected angle.

features.title: Task Orchestration
features.description: Buddy doesn't just answer questions — it gets things done. Spawn research tasks, schedule reminders, manage multi-step workflows, and coordinate with other Heady™ agents — all through natural conversation.

features.title: Buddy Evolution
features.description: HeadyBuddy learns your communication style, preferences, and patterns over time. The longer you work together, the more accurate, personalized, and genuinely helpful Buddy becomes — an AI that grows with you.
